**TSV Hannover-Burgdorf** is a [handball](/wiki/Handball "Handball") club from [Hannover](/wiki/Hannover "Hannover"), Germany, and is competing in the [Handball-Bundesliga](/wiki/Handball-Bundesliga "Handball-Bundesliga").

[![Location of TSV Hannover-Burgdorf](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/e/ed/Germany_adm_location_map.svg/330px-Germany_adm_location_map.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Germany_adm_location_map.svg "Location of TSV Hannover-Burgdorf")

![Hannover](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/0/0c/Red_pog.svg/20px-Red_pog.svg.png)

Hannover

Location of TSV Hannover-Burgdorf

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=TSV_Hannover-Burgdorf&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

The team is known as DIE RECKEN. The origins of the club lie with the sports association Freie Turnerschaft Burgdorf, which was founded in 1922, with a handball department. In 1946 the Turn- und Sportvereinigung Burgdorf was founded. TSV Burgdorf became TSV Hannover-Burgdorf Handball GmbH in 2005. The matches of the top teams have been played since 2005 in one of the two sports arenas in [Hannover](/wiki/Hannover "Hannover"), the [Swiss Life Hall](/wiki/AWD_Hall "AWD Hall") with a capacity of 4,460 spectators, or the [ZAG-Arena](/wiki/TUI_Arena "TUI Arena") where 10,767 spectators can cheer on the team. Given the increasing number of supporters, since 2018 more and more games have been played in the second hall.

## Youth Handball

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=TSV_Hannover-Burgdorf&action=edit&section=14 "Edit section: Youth Handball")]

### A-Juniors

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=TSV_Hannover-Burgdorf&action=edit&section=15 "Edit section: A-Juniors")]

The A-Juniors of the TSV Burgdorf play in the highest German Youth League the "**Jugendbundesliga**". Being one of the 20 best German teams.[[7]](#cite_note-7)

### B-Juniors

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=TSV_Hannover-Burgdorf&action=edit&section=16 "Edit section: B-Juniors")]

The B-Juniors which 2024/25 were the second best German team and first vice champions of the, 2024/25 founded highest B-Junior league, **Jugendbundesliga**. Auto Qualified for the 2024/25 founded highest B-Junior league the German **Jugendbundesliga B-Jugend**.[[8]](#cite_note-8)[[9]](#cite_note-9)
